title: John Llodra
compiled_truth: John Llodra is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-03-30 to 2002-02-28), John Llodra sent 29 and received 353 emails, totalling 382 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jim Meyn](people/jim-meyn) (11), [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (9), [Kay Mann](people/kay-mann) (9), [Marcus Nettelton](people/marcus-nettelton) (8), [Edward Sacks](people/edward-sacks) (8).
